revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Both%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Both%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{high-risk}}
{{template shortcut|&&}}

===Usage===
{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|string1|string2}}

Produces '''1''' (equivalent to a true condition) if both ''string1'' and ''string2'' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).

===TemplateData===
{{TemplateDataHeader}}
<templatedata>{
"description": "Produces '1' (equivalent to a true condition) if both 'string1' and 'string2' are non-empty; otherwise produces the empty string (false condition).",
"params": {
  "1": {
    "label": "String1",
    "description": "First string",
    "type": "string",
    "required": true
  },
  "2": {
    "label": "String2",
    "description": "Second string",
    "type": "string",
    "required": true
  }
}}</templatedata>

== See also ==
* {{tl|if both}}
* {{tl|if}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:If-then-else templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
